title: Keto Indian Butter Chicken
description: A rich and flavorful keto dish with tender chicken cooked in a creamy tomato curry sauce. Serve with a side of cauliflower rice for a low-carb meal.
instructions: 1. Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
2. In a large skillet, melt 1 tbsp of butter over medium-high heat.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tbsp of butter and melt.
6. Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
7. Add the diced tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to break down.
8. Add the heavy cream and garam masala to the skillet and stir to combine.
9. Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
10. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
11. Stir in the chopped basil and tangy cheese.
12. Serve hot over cauliflower rice and enjoy!
